Hero.title_part1: Invest, Buy and Develop Property in Paraguay
Hero.subtitle: Lux Development helps local buyers and international investors navigate Paraguay's real estate market through transparent guidance, local expertise, and end-to-end support—so you can make smarter decisions with less risk.

Sections.featureHeading: One trusted partner for your entire real estate journey.
Sections.featureDescription:
Most real estate providers only handle a single part of the process. 
 Lux Development brings everything together under one roof, helping you move from opportunity to ownership with confidence.
Sections.externalLinksDescription: Read about Patricia Fretes in Asunción Times.
Sections.cardsTitle: Curated properties you can explore now
Sections.cardsSubtitle: Minimalist residences designed to perform for living and investment.
Sections.valueDescription: A premium experience designed around privacy, return and effortless ownership.

valueProposition1.title: Tailored curation
valueProposition1.description: We source only the most promising luxury opportunities.

valueProposition2.title: Data-driven decisions
valueProposition2.description: Market intelligence guides every acquisition and design choice.

valueProposition3.title: Exclusive access
valueProposition3.description: Private listings and partnerships that are not publicly available.

valueProposition4.title: Personalized service
valueProposition4.description: Dedicated teams ensure your experience is seamless from inquiry to closing.

Sections.contactTitle: Let's create your next signature asset
Sections.contactSubtitle: Share your vision and one of our advisors will respond with tailored guidance.

Home.whoWeHelpTitle: Built for people who want certainty before making important real estate decisions.
Home.audience1Description: Access emerging opportunities in one of South America's most promising real estate markets.
Home.audience2Description: Relocate, build, or retire in Paraguay with trusted local guidance every step of the way.
Home.audience3Description: Understand the process, explore financing options, and achieve homeownership with confidence.
Home.audience4Description: Make smarter real estate decisions that protect and grow your future.
Home.missionTitle: Helping shape the future of real estate in Paraguay.
Home.missionParagraph1: We believe Paraguay is entering one of the most important growth periods in its history.
Home.missionParagraph2: Our mission is to make real estate ownership, development, and investment more transparent, accessible, and trustworthy for both local communities and international investors.
Home.missionParagraph4: We help people build security, opportunity, wealth, and a future.
